question: I've been having right lower abdominal pain for six hours with fever and nausea. My doctor thinks it might be appendicitis. Do I need surgery right away?
I have gallstones that have been causing attacks. My surgeon says I need my gallbladder removed. Can I just manage it with diet instead?
I have a groin hernia that doesn't hurt yet. My doctor said I can watch and wait. Is that safe or should I get it repaired now?
I need gallbladder surgery. What is the difference between laparoscopic and open surgery and which should I expect?
I had a small lump in my breast and the biopsy came back as breast cancer. My surgeon mentioned lumpectomy versus mastectomy. How do I decide?
I have a thyroid nodule that requires surgery. What should I know about thyroid surgery and what are the risks?
I've had a pilonidal cyst that keeps getting infected. My surgeon wants to do a procedure. What are the options and which is most definitive?
I have chronic anal fissures that aren't healing with conservative treatment. What surgical options are available?
I was told I have a bowel obstruction. Under what circumstances is surgery required versus conservative management?
I have a large ventral hernia from a previous surgery incision. My surgeon says it needs repair but I'm nervous about recovery. What is involved?
I'm scheduled for colorectal surgery and my surgeon mentioned a possible temporary ostomy. What is a stoma and will it be permanent?
I have hemorrhoids that bleed frequently and cause significant pain. My doctor recommended hemorrhoid surgery. What does the procedure involve?
I'm scheduled for elective surgery and I'm on blood thinners. How long before surgery do I need to stop them and is it safe to do so?
I was diagnosed with colon cancer. My surgeon says they can do a laparoscopic resection. Is minimally invasive surgery as safe and effective for cancer?
What are the warning signs of a post-surgical wound infection and when should I call my surgeon after an operation?
My surgeon recommended sleeve gastrectomy for my obesity and diabetes. How does this surgery work and what are the long-term outcomes?
I have acute diverticulitis confirmed on CT scan. My surgeon wants to admit me. Can this be managed without surgery?
I have a swollen tender lymph node in my neck that has been there for three months. My surgeon wants to excise it. Why can't it just be biopsied with a needle?
I have a 3 cm adrenal mass found on CT. My endocrinologist referred me to a surgeon. Do all adrenal tumors need to be removed?
I have a rectal prolapse that protrudes when I strain. My surgeon suggested a rectopexy. What is this operation and what should I expect?
I'm 72 with multiple health problems and need surgery. My surgeon mentioned my ASA class is III. What does surgical risk class mean?
I have a large hiatal hernia and my GERD is severe despite maximum medication. My surgeon is recommending fundoplication. What is this?
After my appendectomy I'm having severe shoulder tip pain. Is this normal and what causes it?
I have a 4 cm pancreatic cyst found incidentally. My surgeon is considering resection. Not all cysts are cancer — how do you decide which ones to remove?
I've had recurrent bouts of acute pancreatitis. My surgeon is suggesting a procedure on my pancreatic duct. What are the surgical options for chronic pancreatitis?
I need a bowel resection for cancer. The surgeon mentioned they may need to do a Hartmann's procedure. What is this and why does it sometimes require two operations?
My CT showed free air under my diaphragm. My surgeon said this is an emergency. What does free air in the abdomen indicate?
I have a soft tissue mass in my thigh that is growing. My doctor wants me to see a surgical oncologist. Why and what workup is needed first?
I need major abdominal surgery but I'm a smoker. My surgeon told me to quit immediately. How long before surgery does stopping smoking make a real difference?
I am recovering from bowel surgery. My surgeon mentioned the importance of enhanced recovery protocols. What is ERAS and how does it affect my recovery?
